records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you all right, Deputy? You haven't moved a muscle for a while.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you all right, Deputy? You haven't moved a muscle for a while.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you all right, Deputy? You haven't moved a muscle for a while.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was meditating to focus my mind.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was meditating to focus my mind.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was meditating to focus my mind.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The burden of responsibility... is heavy. I suppose Captain always bore this kind of pressure too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The burden of responsibility... is heavy. I suppose Captain always bore this kind of pressure too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The burden of responsibility... is heavy. I suppose Captain always bore this kind of pressure too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Forget what those old fogies said. Captain's a girl too, she's allowed to take a break when she needs one.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Forget what those old fogies said. Captain's a girl too, she's allowed to take a break when she needs one.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Forget what those old fogies said. Captain's a girl too, she's allowed to take a break when she needs one.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. If we stand our ground, she'll be able to return without worry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. If we stand our ground, she'll be able to return without worry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. If we stand our ground, she'll be able to return without worry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...You're both right. Now's not the time to get lost in thought.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...You're both right. Now's not the time to get lost in thought.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...You're both right. Now's not the time to get lost in thought.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I nearly stepped into the match with a clouded heart. What a shame that would've been.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I nearly stepped into the match with a clouded heart. What a shame that would've been.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I nearly stepped into the match with a clouded heart. What a shame that would've been.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm ready now. Everyone, let's go.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm ready now. Everyone, let's go.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm ready now. Everyone, let's go.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A bold move from Canary Squad changing their roster! But! Their opponent is a TASKFORCE with a long and proud history!

root.m_Talk_FRA: Let's go, Deputy!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Like Arius said, the time has come to prove our skills to the people!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Like Arius said, the time has come to prove our skills to the people!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Like Arius said, the time has come to prove our skills to the people!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah! After seeing Arius cheer us on like that, we have to show them something, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah! After seeing Arius cheer us on like that, we have to show them something, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah! After seeing Arius cheer us on like that, we have to show them something, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone, keep your cool. We have not participated in the league for something as personal as that.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone, keep your cool. We have not participated in the league for something as personal as that.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone, keep your cool. We have not participated in the league for something as personal as that.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Whatever the public may think of us, we are here to perform our duties.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Whatever the public may think of us, we are here to perform our duties.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Whatever the public may think of us, we are here to perform our duties.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
But Captain! Arius is
8g!
root.m_Talk_DEU:
But Captain! Arius is
8g!
root.m_Talk_FRA:
But Captain! Arius is
8g!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Nevertheless!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Nevertheless!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Nevertheless!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Today is a very lucky day.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Today is a very lucky day.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Today is a very lucky day.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because it seems we need to claim victory in the league in order to fulfill our duties!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because it seems we need to claim victory in the league in order to fulfill our duties!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because it seems we need to claim victory in the league in order to fulfill our duties!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Zodiac Knights! Now is the time to demonstrate true chivalric honor for all to see!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Zodiac Knights! Now is the time to demonstrate true chivalric honor for all to see!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Zodiac Knights! Now is the time to demonstrate true chivalric honor for all to see!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, ma'am!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, ma'am!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, ma'am!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah! That's what I'm talking about, Deputy!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah! That's what I'm talking about, Deputy!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah! That's what I'm talking about, Deputy!

root.m_Talk_ENG: We follow the Star Guide and fear no enemy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We follow the Star Guide and fear no enemy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We follow the Star Guide and fear no enemy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We act with courage and protect the people.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We act with courage and protect the people.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We act with courage and protect the people.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even if our blades are broken in defeat...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even if our blades are broken in defeat...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even if our blades are broken in defeat...

root.m_Talk_ENG: We shall save all, without hesitation, in every sense of the word!
root.m_Talk_DEU: We shall save all, without hesitation, in every sense of the word!
root.m_Talk_FRA: We shall save all, without hesitation, in every sense of the word!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Um... So, uh...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Um... So, uh...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Um... So, uh...

root.m_Talk_ENG: For the common salvation of all who've lost their way, may the Guide bless me with wisdom and grace!
root.m_Talk_DEU: For the common salvation of all who've lost their way, may the Guide bless me with wisdom and grace!
root.m_Talk_FRA: For the common salvation of all who've lost their way, may the Guide bless me with wisdom and grace!

root.m_Talk_ENG: In accordance with the holy covenant upheld by the Twelve Houses, I shall fulfill my true role here and now!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: In accordance with the holy covenant upheld by the Twelve Houses, I shall fulfill my true role here and now!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: In accordance with the holy covenant upheld by the Twelve Houses, I shall fulfill my true role here and now!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, right! That's how it goes!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, right! That's how it goes!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, right! That's how it goes!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Zodiac Knights! Get into formation!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Zodiac Knights! Get into formation!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Zodiac Knights! Get into formation!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...O Star Guide.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...O Star Guide.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...O Star Guide.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Illuminate the path before us.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Illuminate the path before us.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Illuminate the path before us.
